Single fluorescent bulb flickering in empty hallway, casting strobing shadows
Television displaying static snow, illuminating living room in pale blue
Candle flame bending horizontally despite no wind or open windows
Shadow stretching across wall doesn't match the object casting it
Silhouette of someone standing motionless in upstairs window watching you
Two reflective eyes hovering in complete darkness between the trees
Wallpaper peeling away reveals desperate handwritten messages underneath repeating help
Dark stain on wooden floor shaped exactly like a sprawled body
Mirror cracked in spiderweb pattern with your reflection's eyes missing
Piano with single middle C key pressed down, bench empty
Rocking chair still gently moving back and forth, creaking rhythmically
Telephone receiver hanging off hook, dial tone droning in silence
Centipede with too many segments spiraling up the bathroom wall
Black mold spreading across ceiling forming almost-recognizable shapes and faces
Dozens of crows perched on power lines, all facing same direction
Porcelain doll turned to face corner, dress and hair pristine
Antique clock hands spinning rapidly counterclockwise while ticking echoes loudly
Child's crayon drawing showing your house with red scribbles inside
Dense fog creeping under door gap, pooling unnaturally on floor
Rain droplets suspended mid-air, falling upward toward heavy grey sky
Complete absence of wind, leaves frozen mid-fall, oppressive stillness everywhere
Deep claw marks scored on inside of locked door frame
Empty wheelchair positioned facing blank wall in abandoned hospital corridor
Children's shoes arranged in perfect circle around basement drain opening
Handprints pressed against window from the inside, glass fogged with breath
